Michigan Women’s Basketball (@umichwbball)

Onward! 〽️

#GoBlue





— https://nitter.net/umichwbball/status/2035135799230955531#m
Eid Mubarak, Michigan!  As the holy month of Ramadan comes to an end, I’m wishing every Michigander a joyful Eid as they gather with loved ones.

Since I took office through the end of last construction season, we’ve got a lot done:

🔸26,500 lane miles of road, fixed
🔸2,000 bridges, repaired
🔸200,000+ jobs, supported   

When you see those orange barrels out and about just know… I’m sorry and you’re welcome!

LFG 〽️


Michigan Men's Basketball (@umichbball)

Took care of business in round one! 💯





— https://nitter.net/umichbball/status/2034807021287907690#m

That’s how you start off March Madness 😤


Michigan State Men's Basketball (@MSU_Basketball)

LET'S KEEP DANCING 🪩





— https://nitter.net/MSU_Basketball/status/2034760754050535850#m

As a mom, I know every parent wants their child to be healthy and supported.

In Michigan, we take mental health seriously, and the opening of Pine Rest Pediatric Center will help more families get the care they need. mlive.com/news/grand-rapids/…

For too many Michigan families, finding a home they can afford feels out of reach. There aren’t enough homes, and the ones on the market are too damn expensive.
 
We need to make it easier to build more housing, bring down costs, and help more families find a place to call home.

Every day, communities are rocked by senseless gun violence. Through Operation Safe Neighborhoods we’ve gotten 950 illegal guns out of the hands of criminals who aren't legally allowed to possess a firearm.

Let’s continue working across the aisle to build a safer Michigan.
The brackets of a totally unbiased Michigander…

By taking this action, the state can respond to local requests faster and make every resource available to local communities to clear roads, deliver fuel, fix damage and keep the lights on. 

I want to thank all first responders who are working tirelessly to keep people safe.
This afternoon, I’ve declared a state of emergency for counties in the U.P. and northern Michigan to coordinate an all-hands-on-deck response to a historic blizzard. upnorthlive.com/news/local/g…
Have a fun, safe St. Patrick’s Day, Michigan 🍀

Books can take kids anywhere, and sometimes all it takes is the right nudge to get them fired up to read.

We’ve got some tips from the experts because every kid deserves that spark 📖

Video

Thank you to our first responders and emergency crews in Northern Michigan and the UP working around the clock to keep Michiganders safe.

As winter conditions continue to worsen throughout the region, please stay inside and stay safe.

I received the good news this afternoon that FEMA officially granted our appeal after I met with the president earlier this week. This will help lower costs for Michiganders who have shouldered the burden for utility repairs.


Detroit Free Press (@freep)

Gov. Whitmer meets with Trump, secures emergency aid, talk Great Lakes 
📸 Provided By Matthew Clara, Michigan Department Of Natural Resources
freep.com/story/news/politic…





— https://nitter.net/freep/status/2031503990081380473#m
